privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Android development task where agents add notification infrastructure to a NotepadApp Android Studio project. The project is created fresh at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/NotepadApp with package name com.example.notepadapp (API 26-34, Java 17, Kotlin, AndroidX, Material Design). The task requires: (1) creating NotificationHelper.kt at app/src/main/java/com/example/notepadapp/notifications/NotificationHelper.kt with two notification channels - "note_reminders" using IMPORTANCE_HIGH and "app_updates" using IMPORTANCE_DEFAULT, plus a buildReminderNotification method using NotificationCompat.Builder with android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_info; (2) creating NotepadApplication.kt at app/src/main/java/com/example/notepadapp/NotepadApplication.kt extending android.app.Application with onCreate() calling channel creation; (3) updating app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml to declare .NotepadApplication and add android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS (official Android 13+ permission per https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/views/notifications/notification-permission); (4) verifying successful build via Gradle. The verifier checks file presence, channel IDs, importance levels, method implementations, manifest declarations, permissions, and build success (15-point scoring: files 8pts, channels 14pts, method 10pts, importance 10pts, builder 8pts, Application inheritance 10pts, onCreate wiring 8pts, manifest 10pts, permission 7pts, build 15pts).
